chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-749 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of main case 18.11.2025 None present for the petitioner --------- None is in attendance. Same was the position on the last date of hearing and the matter was adjourned with a note of caution that if the petitioner fails to appear and comply with the office objection then the matter shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. Since today none is in attendance and the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE Nadir*
